  • Preparation (Info)

    • MPEC 2024-Y17 : 2024 YD

    The following Minor Planet Electronic Circular may be linked-to from your own Web pages, but must not otherwise be redistributed electronically.

    A form allowing access to any MPEC is at the bottom of this page.

    Read MPEC 2024-Y16 Read MPEC 2024-Y18 

    M.P.E.C. 2024-Y17                             Issued 2024 December 20, 15:21 UT

     The Minor Planet Electronic Circulars contain information on unusual
         minor planets, routine data on comets and natural satellites,
         and occasional editorial announcements.  They are published
    on behalf of Division F of the International Astronomical Union by the
          Minor Planet Center, Smithsonian Astrophysical Observatory,
                          Cambridge, MA 02138, U.S.A.
			  
             Prepared using the Tamkin Foundation Computer Network

                              MPC@CFA.HARVARD.EDU
            URL https://www.minorplanetcenter.net/    ISSN 1523-6714

                                 2024 YD

Observer details:
718 Tooele.  Observer P. Wiggins.  0.35-m f/5.5 Schmidt-Cassegrain + CCD.
900 Moriyama.  Observer Y. Ikari.  0.26-m f/7.0 reflector + CMO.
958 Observatoire de Dax.  Observers P. Dupouy, J. Laborde.  Measurer P.
    Dupouy.  0.30-m f/5 Schmidt-Cassegrain + CMO.
C40 Kuban State University Astrophysical Observatory.  Observers A. Ivanov, A.
    Barcov, V. Ivanov, V. Lysenko, N. Yakovenko, N. Ivanova, G. Kurbatov, A.
    Ozhered, V. Roshchupko.  Measurer A. Ivanov.  0.51-m f/8 reflector + CCD.
G96 Mt. Lemmon Survey.  Observer J. B. Fazekas.  Measurers T. Beuden, V. F.
    Carvajal, D. Fay, J. B. Fazekas, D. C. Fuls, A. R. Gibbs, A. D. Grauer, H.
    Groeller, J. K. Hogan, R. A. Kowalski, S. M. Larson, G. J. Leonard, D.
    Rankin, R. L. Seaman, F. C. Shelly, K. W. Wierzchos.  1.5-m reflector +
    10K CCD.
I52 Steward Observatory, Mt. Lemmon Station.  Observer V. F. Carvajal.
    Measurers T. Beuden, V. F. Carvajal, D. Fay, J. B. Fazekas, D. C. Fuls, A.
    R. Gibbs, A. D. Grauer, H. Groeller, J. K. Hogan, R. A. Kowalski, S. M.
    Larson, G. J. Leonard, D. Rankin, R. L. Seaman, F. C. Shelly, K. W.
    Wierzchos.  1.0-m prime focus + CCD.
J95 Great Shefford.  Observer P. Birtwhistle.  0.41-m f/6.3 Schmidt-Cassegrain
    + CCD.
L04 ROASTERR-1 Observatory, Cluj-Napoca.  Observer L. Hudin.  0.30-m f/5
    reflector + CCD.
L76 Nomad Observatory, Kochevanchik.  Observer E. Romas.  0.25-m f/4 Newton +
    CMO.
M35 PS Observatory, Parjol.  Observer R. Anghel.  Measurers R. Anghel, A.
    Anghel.  0.25-m f/8.0 RC + CMO.
P13 Baihuashan Observatory, Beijing.  Observers Z. Wang, B. Liu.  Measurer Z.
    Wang.  0.28-m f/2.2 reflector + CMO.
Q06 Tarui Observatory, Tarui.  Observer H. Watanabe.  0.35-m f/1.9 Schmidt-
    Cassegrain + CMO.
Q10 Toyokawa Observatory.  Observer M. Ishiguro.  0.20-m f/5 reflector + CCD.
Z80 Northolt Branch Observatory.  Observer G. Wells.  0.25-m f/8.0 Ritchey-
    Chretien + CCD.

    Enter an MPEC number in one of the following forms:

    • 1997-B01 (the full form)
    • J97B01 (the packed version of the full form)
    • B01 (the abbreviated form)
